name: The Baker’s Wife
description: A small French village deals with romance, mischief, and melody when a baker's wife is led into temptation. This production features the first major New York appearance of Stephen Schwartz’s soaring score, including the song "Meadowlark."

name: Joseph Marioni: Artist’s Choice
description: The New York Studio School presents Joseph Marioni: Artist’s Choice, a works on paper retrospective curated by Karen Wilkin. It features over thirty works on paper that trace the evolution of a painter’s half-century engagement with color, surface, and perception.

name: UrbanSparkle 2025
description: UrbanSparkle is the annual exhibition showcasing jewelers who work with glass, featuring artists like Deirdre Maine, Everett Hoffman, Julia Turner, and Nikki Couppee. This exhibition highlights contemporary glass jewelry from talented artists.

name: Glass Fusing Warriors: An exhibition of Veterans from the Brooklyn VA
description: UrbanGlass presents "Glass Fusing Warriors," an exhibition of fused glass artwork by veteran artists from the Brooklyn VA's "Fun With Fusing" program. The exhibition celebrates the stories, creativity, and resilience of service members through their glass art.
short_name: An exhibition of Veterans from the Brooklyn VA

name: Brunch Italiano!
description: Spend your Saturday afternoon at Evento! Surround yourself with delicious food, great drinks, fun music and an overall perfect vibe for a Saturday afternoon! Guests will roll their own rigatoni, cut pasta sheets using the chitarra, eat Northern-Italian inspired bites, swirl, and savor your way through this hands-on Italian feast.

name: Every Sunday Afternoon: Filled Pasta Making!
description: Traditionally Sunday is a day in Italian culture friends and family come together to cook, eat, and share quality time. Evento brings this mindset Sunday afternoons! These events are a perfect way to wind down your weekend. On Sundays we always teach really fun pastas such as Tortelli, Tortellini, Ravioli, Cappelletti, and more!

name: Alternate Side Parking Suspended
description: Alternate Side Parking is suspended. Refer to the provided link for the full-year calendar.

name: Concern for Quaker Living (CQL) Working Group Meeting
description: Concern for Quaker Living (CQL) helps our meetings to welcome and nurture a caring community of Friends in all stages of life, particularly the oldest Friends. This working group meeting focuses on community support and Quaker values.
short_name: Concern for Quaker Living Working Group Meeting

name: HOT 100 Bingo - Alligator Lounge
description: Score a HOT 100 B-I-N-G-O and win vintage LPs, fabulous prizes, and free booze! This event happens every Tuesday.

name: Friendly Co-working at Brooklyn Meeting
description: Join Friends and friends-of-Friends for co-working at Brooklyn Meeting. Drop by any time. We supply chairs, tables, power, tea, coffee, snacks, and wifi.

name: CB6 Full Board Meeting
description: This is a full board meeting for Brooklyn Community Board 6. Further details can be found by adding the event to your calendar.

name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers
description: A mutually supportive space for job seekers to share experiences, encouragement, and practical strategies. This group helps members build resilience, confidence, and hope through shared journey.
short_name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers

name: EVERY FRIDAY NIGHT: Evento x Bucketlisters Cooking Party!
description: Spend your Friday afternoon at Evento! Surround yourself with delicious food, great drinks, fun music and an overall perfect vibe for a Friday afternoon! Guests will roll their own rigatoni, cut pasta sheets using the chitarra, eat Northern-Italian inspired bites, swirl, and savor your way through this hands-on Italian feast.

name: Bipoc Meetup
description: Join the BIPOC Climbing Collective for a night of bouldering, ropes, and fun at Gowanus. This event is for Black, Indigenous, People of Color to climb and build community.

name: The Phoenix
description: The Phoenix hosts sober climbing events for members and guests on the second Saturday of every month. The only requirement to attend is 48 hours of continuous sobriety. Friends and family are welcome.

name: Crux Queer Femme
description: Crux Queer Femme is a climbing event designed for individuals who identify as femme or have felt femme and want to climb. This event offers a welcoming space for all.

name: Sentimental Value
description: This film, winner of the Cannes Film Festival Grand Prize, is praised as potentially the best movie of the year.

name: Hamnet
description: From Academy Award® winning writer/director Chloé Zhao, Hamnet tells the powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare’s timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

name: Dead Man's Wire
description: A limited exclusive engagement for one week only! On February 8, 1977, Tony Kiritsis took Richard Hall hostage with a sawed-off shotgun wired with a "dead man's wire."

name: Is This Thing on?
description: As their marriage unravels, Alex seeks new purpose in the comedy scene while Tess confronts sacrifices.

name: The Secret Agent
description: This film is 100% on Tomatometer and won 3 Cannes Film Festival awards.

After acclaimed, sold-out runs in Chicago and LA, the smash-hit comedy musical _44_ heads to Off-Broadway for a limited run. It's a must-see show, drawing in audiences with its smart, sophisticated satire and hilarious spoof R&B musical.

name: Masks On Craft Night
description: All the fun of a regular craft night with the added safety of a masks-required environment. Free (and optional) tickets are available here: This event, like all NYC Resistor events is 18 and over and governed by out code of conduct.

name: Advent Centering Prayer
description: Join us each morning of Advent for Centering Prayer, led by Kate Baum. We begin each session with a reading of the day's devotional, followed by contemplative prayer over Zoom. It's a great opportunity to find peace and center yourself in the reason for the season amid the holiday hustle and bustle.

name: WSCAH’s 86th Street Market
description: Each month, customers can receive a regular distribution of USDA MyPlate Balanced groceries. These packages contain a variety of healthy items, including grains, proteins, dairy products, and a wide selection of fresh fruits and vegetables.

name: Pamela Presents: Anderson & 1935, Live and LIVESTREAMED!
description: In Pamela, no one can hear you Anderson What could a sketch team named Pamela do for you? We’ll show you. Join us for an hour of comedy where in the first half you’ll meet people like video game…

name: Tiger Woods
description: The funniest stand-ups in NYC tee off for a night of above par comedy. Join hosts Justin Catchens (Bleacher Report) and Dan Yang (HBO Max) for a night of stand-up comedy in an intimate setting. This show has nothing…

name: Wake Up Dead Man: a Knives Out Mystery
description: PG-13. NO PASSES.
short_name: Wake Up Dead Man: a Knives Out Mystery

name: The King of Color
description: PG. CLOSED CAPTIONING, NO PASSES.

name: Blue Moon
description: R. CLOSED CAPTIONING, DESCRIPTIVE AUDIO, NO PASSES.

name: Distillery Tours
description: Find out how Kings County Distillery became the oldest whiskey distillery in New York City since prohibition! Learn about our process from milling, mashing, fermenting, and distilling then enter our barrel room for a tasting of some of our core products.

name: The Online Open Mic hosted by Elemen2al
description: This is an online Open Mic event hosted by Elemen2al. Open Mics at the Nuyorican Poets Cafe are open to all forms of expression, including music, poetry, comedy, and storytelling.
short_name: The Online Open Mic hosted by Elemen2al

name: NYCR Craft Night
description: NYC Resistor is open to the public for Craft Nights now every Monday and Thursday from 6:30-late! Come bring your current crafting project and work on it with other artists, crafters, and makers of all kinds. Resistors do everything from costumes to electronics to visual arts to woodworking; people and crafting projects of all sorts are enthusiastically welcome! RSVP at is appreciated but not required, for covid contact-tracing purposes. This event like all NYC Resistor events is 18 and over and governed by out code of conduct.

name: Public Craft Night Mondays and Thursdays!
description: Welcome to Craft Night! Masks are now OPTIONAL at all our Craft Nights, Mondays and Thursdays. Your RSVP here is much appreciated so we can notify you of any covid contact after the fact, but is not required. Come on out, bring your freinds, and stay safe out there! NYC Resistor is open to the public for Craft Nights every Monday and Thursday from 6:30-9:30 PM!
short_name: Public Craft Night Mondays and Thursdays!

name: Pilates
description: Nancy M leads an hour-long strengthening and stretching class of Pilates. Beginners welcome! Join us on Zoom.

name: Tastes of Chinatown: Neighborhood History and Food Tour
description: Take a field trip into the alleyways of New York City’s world-famous Chinatown. See neighborhood landmarks, savor culinary delights, and discover Chinatown’s incredible history. Come hungry as you will taste four savory dishes and one dessert on this 3-hour tour.

name: Intro to Screen Printing
description: Join us for a hands-on introduction to screen printing! In this workshop, we’ll cover the basics of the process and walk through each step!Join us for a hands-on introduction to screen printing! In this workshop, we’ll cover the basics of the process and walk through each step of creating a screen. Using vinyl stencils, we’ll quickly make screens and print custom designs onto t-shirts.

name: Open Hours
description: Come visit the Old Stone House during our public Open Hours.

name: Asssscat NY, Live and Livestreamed!
description: ASSSSCAT is UCB’s signature improv show that has played to critical acclaim and sold out audiences across the country. What is ASSSSCAT? It starts with a group of improv comedians from film & TV taking the stage with a special…

name: The Stepfathers, Live and LIVESTREAMED!
description: Come watch your favorite improvisers, Shannon O’Neill, Connor Ratliff, Alex Dickson & Sebastian Conelli make all the sad things funny. The legendary improv group The Stepfathers, have survived almost 2 decades performing in NYC. Born in the basement of UCB…

name: When Harry Met Sally
description: A classic romantic comedy about the enduring friendship between two people who meet by chance and the development of their relationship over twelve years.

name: The Housemaid
description: A suspenseful thriller about a young woman who takes a job as a maid in a wealthy family's home and becomes entangled in their dark secrets.

name: The Secret Agent
description: This neo-noir masterpiece follows a former teacher and political dissident on the run during the waning years of Brazil’s military dictatorship.

name: Sentimental Value
description: Joachim Trier directs this magnetic comedy-drama about legacy, art, and the performances that bind and divide families.

name: Standing Slightly Outside: Franklin Furnace, 1976—2026
description: A gallery show marking the 50th anniversary of a vital New York arts space and archive.

name: A Christmas Carol at the Merchant’s House
description: Actor John Kevin Jones and Vince Gatton perform a captivating 70-minute version of Dickens' holiday classic using the author's own script. The performance takes place in a landmark 1832 parlor surrounded by period decorations and flickering candles.

name: A Jolly Holiday: Christmas Traditions from New Amsterdam
description: This exhibition highlights Dutch holiday traditions from the founding of New Amsterdam that persisted into the 19th century. On display are holiday gifts from the Tredwell collection and period-appropriate decorations throughout the house.

name: A Night in Roma!
description: Transport yourself to the Eternal City for an unforgettable Roman winter night. This immersive culinary experience features interactive stations where you’ll roll pasta, shake up Roman-inspired cocktails and eat lots of great food! The event also includes a live DJ, on-site sketch artist, and open bar.

name: Brunch Italiano!
description: Spend a Saturday afternoon rolling rigatoni and cutting pasta with a chitarra while enjoying Northern Italian bites. The event features an open wine bar and festive music.

name: A Night in Rome - Winter Festa!
description: Experience a Roman-style celebration with an Italian aperitivo, spritzes, and regional food. This high-energy event features great vibes and music in the heart of NYC.
short_name: A Night in Rome - Winter Festa!

name: Museum Highlights Tour
description: Join us for an informative and engaging tour that illustrates some of the highlights of our subway station home. We’ll explore exhibits, objects, and vintage train cars currently on display. Along the way discover transit trivia and hear some behind the scenes stories about the history of New York’s Transit System and our Court Street station.
sublocation: Sign Gallery at the back of the Mezzanine level

name: Intro to Soldering Workshop: Make an LED Tile
description: Soldering is one of the most important skills you’ll need for working with electronics. Come join us for an introductory through-hole solderSoldering is one of the most important skills you’ll need for working with electronics. Come join us for an introductory through-hole soldering workshop. Soldering enables you to create sturdy connections between electrical components.

name: Holiday Party at Union Hall
description: A holiday party hosted by an NYC-based social club, open to all. Connect with a diverse group of people and enjoy a festive evening.

name: What the Hell? An Incredible Improv Show, Live and LIVESTREAMED!
description: No gimmicks, this is a great improv show where talented performers do what they love – improv! You want more to read? Ok! We’re combining veteran performers and up-and-comers to put on an incredible improv show. It is simple but…
short_name: What the Hell? An Incredible Improv Show, Live and LIVESTREAMED!

name: Sketch Cram, Live and Livestreamed!
description: A sketch comedy show made in ONE day, featuring New York’s best comedy writers and performers! Once a month, we cram together New York’s best writers and performers to craft an ALL-NEW sketch comedy show from scratch IN ONE SINGLE…

name: Exploration: LIVE!
description: A live recording of the popular podcast Exploration: LIVE! featuring comedic discussions.

name: Family Bowl
description: An all-ages bowling session where families can enjoy food and fun until 5:00 PM. No cover charge is required for entry during these hours.

name: Festive Holiday Pop-Up Bar
description: This festive pop-up bar serves over-the-top holiday cocktails and mocktails in a dog-friendly space filled with twinkle lights and zero laptops. Bring your fur-friends for a sparkly holiday vibe featuring peppermint, glitter, and good cheer.

name: Beginning Knitting
description: Master the basics of knitting to create your first hat or scarf. Learn how to cast on and perform the knit stitch with individualized help.

name: Open Hours at the Environmental Education Center
description: Explore the park through monthly educational themes, a 250-gallon aquarium, and a 10-foot scale model of the park. Includes a special "Feed the Fauna" program at 3:00 PM to watch animal feedings.

name: Bargemusic Chamber Concerts
description: Enjoy free classical chamber music performances featuring established and emerging artists at the Brooklyn Bridge Park Boathouse. Doors open 15 minutes before the concert with no tickets required.

name: Play at BCM
description: BCM is open for play! Come explore some of our most-loved exhibits, including toddler-favorite Totally Tots and the miniature shops of World Brooklyn.

name: Brooklyn Navy Yard: Past, Present & Future
description: This permanent exhibition tells the story of the Yard from its 1801 founding to its current role as a modern industrial hub. Visitors explore three floors of history and artifacts inside a restored 1858 residence.

name: Coat Drive Distribution
description: Join library staff for the first of two distribution dates to receive donated winter coats and accessories. This event helps ensure neighborhood residents stay warm during the winter season.

name: Peer Revue
description: Comedians attempt to present academic slides they have never seen before, followed by the actual expert giving the real lecture.
A smash-hit comedy musical spoofing the story of Barack Obama as Joe Biden remembers it. The show features Broadway-caliber singing and smart, sophisticated satire.

name: Pen Pals
description: A moving play about two friends from different countries who maintain a deep connection through letters over fifty years. The production features a rotating cast of renowned actors.

name: Radio
description: An exhibition featuring the work of Hagen Eberle and Matthias Holznagel.

name: Fall 2025 Exhibitions Tour
description: Experience a guided tour of the current Fall 2025 exhibitions led by knowledgeable museum staff.

name: Visita Guiada Exhibiciones (Español)
description: Únase a una visita guiada en español para explorar las exhibiciones actuales del Centro Internacional de Fotografía.

name: Peoples’ Voice Cafe
description: An alternative coffeehouse presenting a seasonal performance featuring folk, blues, and storytelling. This long-running series highlights social issues and artists from underrepresented cultures.

name: McGolrick Bird Club
description: Free birding walks are held every Saturday morning year-round for enthusiasts of all levels.

name: A Christmas Carol at the Merchant's House
description: Celebrate the holiday season with a special performance of A Christmas Carol in a historic setting.

name: Contemporary Dance with Andrea Murillo
description: A supportive dance class for adults focused on somatic approach, alignment, and phrase work. Intermediate level with beginners always welcome.

name: Radical History Walking Tour
description: An guided exploration of the neighborhood's radical history and community-oriented spaces.

name: Happy Hour Live Music • Jazz with Pete Mattheisson!
description: Start your evening with live jazz during happy hour featuring Pete Mattheisson.

name: The Cellar Series • Gypsy Jazz with Antoine Thouvenin!
description: Experience the sounds of Gypsy Jazz in the Cellar Series featuring Antoine Thouvenin.

name: Safaera Saturdays @ The Delancey's Lower Level
description: Join the city’s lively night owls for a high-energy reggaeton dance party in the venue's lower level. Experience pulsating Latin beats and vibrant nightlife vibes.

name: Saturday Nights @ The Delancey Nightclub
description: Immerse yourself in an unforgettable NYC night out with top DJs and an electrifying dance floor. This premier nightclub event offers a dynamic atmosphere for your weekend outing.

name: Reggaeton Saturdays @ The DL
description: Join the party for a night of high-energy reggaeton and Latin beats across multiple floors.

name: Rooftop Saturdays
description: Experience one of NYC's premier rooftop parties with dancing and spectacular views of the Lower East Side.

name: Laughing Buddha Comedy
description: A comedy showcase featuring a diverse lineup of rising stars and established acts like Jeff Lawrence and Daryn Passarello.

name: Midnight In The Main Room
description: Close out your Saturday night with Chris Riggins during this special midnight stand-up session.

name: Coast 2 Coast with DJ Rubie Lee
description: Experience a celebration of diasporic sound, movement, and culture with a mix of Afrobeat, Amapiano, and Dancehall. Enjoy drink specials from D'usse and food from market vendors.

name: Bottomless Brunch
description: Enjoy bottomless mimosas and bellinis along with a $30 TOM card to use at any of the market's food concessions. It is the perfect way to spend a weekend afternoon in Dumbo.

name: Holiday Nostalgia Rides
description: This holiday season, the New York Transit Museum and MTA New York City Transit continue the annual tradition of Holiday Nostalgia Rides aboard vintage 1930s subway cars. Running every Sunday in December from 10am to 5pm, the Holiday Nostalgia Train departs from 2 Av–Houston St on the uptown F line and 96 St–2 Av on the Q line.
sublocation: 2 Av–Houston St (uptown F line) and 96 St–2 Av (Q line)

name: Mozart for Munchkins at the Old Stone House
description: This month: Winter Wonderland and Ballet Magic. This event is geared towards young children to introduce them to classical music.

name: Sunday Worship
description: Join us in the sanctuary or online for a joyful, inspiring, thought-provoking, intimate, and entertaining celebration of life and faith and another wonderful St. Paul & St. Andrew Christmas season tradition, our service of Lessons & Carols.

name: Nursery and Childcare
description: Nursery Care, provided by the professional sitters at Smart Sitting, is available for children ages 1-3 during the worship service. Check in at the front desk when you arrive for service and you will be directed to the childcare room. Kids are always welcome in the sanctuary as well. Sunday School for kids ages 4-10 is also available.

name: The Lady Jam
description: A jam-meets-dance-party for women and non-binary improvisors of all levels <3 Lady Jam is a longstanding UCB tradition — a free, inclusive, and welcoming improv jam for UCB students, performers, and fans who identify as women or non-binary! All you…

name: Issues and Action Discussion Circle
description: A community discussion group focused on exploring current events and organizing for social action.

name: The Schmooze
description: A group of experienced comedians aged 69+ brings folks together for an afternoon of unfiltered kibitzing, kvetching, and improv comedy.

name: RAAAATSCRAPS: The Best Improv Show in the World
description: Veteran improvisers from the Upright Citizens Brigade perform high-energy scenes inspired by monologues from a special guest.
short_name: The Best Improv Show in the World

name: Sundays in Italia, Filled Pasta Making!
description: Learn the art of crafting filled pastas like ravioli and tortellini in this hands-on Sunday session. Enjoy a full Italian dining experience with an open wine bar.
short_name: Sundays in Italia, Filled Pasta Making!

name: Sunday Service
description: A weekly worship gathering celebrating the spiritual journeys of the congregation and exploring prophetic love. This service emphasizes a co-creative, justice-minded narrative within the community.

name: Free Form Movement with Sofia Quezaire
description: An all-levels class centered on body connection and community through meditation, kinetic stretching, and improvised movement.

name: Sunday in New Orleans with Konstantin & The Konstellation!
description: Konstantin & The Konstellation bring the vibrant spirit of New Orleans to NYC on Sunday night.

name: Fix Your Own Bike Workshop
description: This open shop workshop provides the tools and stands you need to work on your own bike. Experienced mechanics are available to answer questions while you perform the repairs.

name: Signature Sundays
description: Chase away the Sunday scaries with live music from local acts and specialty cocktails from Juliette Liquer. Pair the performances with food from editor-approved vendors.

name: Rev. Vince Anderson & The Love Choir!
description: Get into the holiday spirit with Rev. Vince Anderson & The Love Choir's special Christmas performance.
short_name: Rev. Vince Anderson & The Love Choir!

name: Christmas In Nickyland
description: A festive and experimental holiday production that brings a unique twist to seasonal celebrations.

name: Spare Time Comedy
description: Marcus and Jake host the Spare Room’s newest comedy open mic every Monday evening. Aspiring comedians can sign up starting at 6:00 PM to perform.

name: Morning Food Scrap Drop-off
description: Bring your food scraps to be converted into nutrient-rich compost used throughout the park. Accepted items include fruits, vegetables, coffee grounds, and bread.

name: Winter Workshops with A Rosie Day
description: Join free bi-weekly winter workshops featuring cozy crafting and seasonal magic. All ages are welcome to participate, even those who are not skating.

name: Film Noir Mondays
description: This series is dedicated to bringing to light lesser known and very obscure films that fit the Film Noir genre. Movie titles are not revealed beforehand to keep the audience in total darkness.

name: Excess Anonymous
description: An intimate group dedicated to examining the relationship between consumer culture and spiritual health. Participants engage in deep reflection, self-inquiry, and shared storytelling in a supportive space.

name: Concern for Quaker Living (CQL) Working Group Meeting
description: This working group focuses on nurturing a caring community of Friends through housing studies and wellness support.
short_name: Concern for Quaker Living Working Group Meeting

name: Dr. Boat Jam - No Cover
description: Step into the spotlight and join the band at this inclusive jam session for seasoned performers and music lovers alike. Share the stage and groove with top local talent.

name: Open Mic Hosted by Simeon Goodson
description: Isola Brooklyn hosts an open mic night every Tuesday. The event features 15 comedians and 8 DJs, with no cover charge. Sign-ups begin at 7 PM.
short_name: Open Mic Hosted by Simeon Goodson

name: Rosh Chodesh Women's Circle
location: Kehila Kedosha Janina Synagogue and Museum
description: Join us to come together as a community to honor each other and inaugurate the New Moon. We will provide a space to set clear intentions for the month ahead and reflect on personal growth.

name: A-Sides Presents: Dr. S&M / DYR FASER / Erik Gundel
description: A-Sides presents a night of diverse musical acts including Dr. S&M, DYR FASER, and Erik Gundel.
short_name: Dr. S&M / DYR FASER / Erik Gundel

name: Pajama Prayers
description: Start your day with 30 minutes of prayer and connection over Zoom.

name: "Christmas in December"
description: Celebrate the holiday season with a special "Christmas in December" live music event.

name: HOT 100 Bingo - Alligator Lounge
description: Join the local crowd for a night of competitive bingo and social fun at this popular Brooklyn lounge. It is a recurring event featuring the Hot 100 hits and great company.

name: Rod Wave The Redemption Experience Tour
description: Rod Wave brings his powerful Redemption Experience Tour to the Brooklyn stage.
short_name: Rod Wave The Redemption Experience Tour

name: Cult Cinema
description: A night of sheer cinematic madness dedicated to the most obscure and strange films ever made. It is the perfect event for fans of unconventional and rare cult classics.

name: The Open Mic Downstairs @ Frigid New York
description: A supportive weekly open mic where performers get 7 minutes to showcase comedy, music, storytelling, or dance.

name: 222 Tuesdays
description: Visit the historical loft at 222 Bowery to browse artist-selected books and records, see the Burroughs bedroom, and enjoy music and conversation. This weekly community gathering is free and open to everyone.

name: Bible Study Group
description: A weekly discussion group that identifies specific aspects of the Bible to generate individual thought and respectful conversation. Participants examine both Old and New Testament scriptures for 21st-century meaning.

name: Contact Improvisation Jam
description: A movement jam featuring live music and a supportive environment for contact improvisation. Includes an introductory period and a silent movement jam.

name: Tuesday Trivia with TriviaNYC
description: Play four rounds of trivia on paper and pencil for a chance to win swag, tickets, and tacos. It is free to play, though reservations are recommended.

name: MoRUS 13th Anniversary Party
description: A community celebration honoring thirteen years of documenting and preserving community-oriented spaces in New York.

name: Celebrating 10+ years of Gypsy Jazz with Alex Simon!
description: A special evening celebrating over a decade of Gypsy Jazz performances with artist Alex Simon.

name: Live: Jazz Jorei and Jam - No Cover
description: Immerse yourself in the smooth improvisations and soulful rhythms of classic jazz. This session blends traditional tones with spontaneous jam sessions for a fresh, vibrant sound.
short_name: Live: Jazz Jorei and Jam - No Cover

name: Kompa Tuesdays NYC
description: Known as the best Haitian party in Manhattan, this event features vibrant Kompa music and a high-energy atmosphere.

name: The Stand Presents: Janeane Garofalo, Jon Rudnitsky, Tristan Bowling, & More!
description: A Tuesday night special featuring Janeane Garofalo, Jon Rudnitsky, and a great mix of NYC talent.
short_name: Janeane Garofalo, Jon Rudnitsky, Tristan Bowling, & More!

name: The Stand Presents: Matthew Broussard, Janeane Garofalo, Rachel Feinstein, Cipha Sounds, & More!
description: Rachel Feinstein and Cipha Sounds join a heavy-hitting lineup for a major Tuesday night event.
short_name: Matthew Broussard, Janeane Garofalo, Rachel Feinstein, Cipha Sounds, & More!

name: The Stand Presents: Cipha Sounds, Matthew Broussard, Corey B, & More!
description: Cipha Sounds and Corey B bring high energy to the upstairs lounge for this Tuesday night showcase.
short_name: Cipha Sounds, Matthew Broussard, Corey B, & More!

name: The Stand Presents: Rachel Feinstein, Jon Rudnitsky, Andre Kim, Matthew Broussard, & More!
description: End your Tuesday night with Rachel Feinstein and Jon Rudnitsky in this premier stand-up event.
short_name: Rachel Feinstein, Jon Rudnitsky, Andre Kim, Matthew Broussard, & More!

name: Tuesday Night Jazz with Danny Jonokuchi
description: Enjoy an intimate evening of jazz and wine featuring the award-winning Danny Jonokuchi & The Revisionists. This bi-weekly series brings classic swing and big band sounds to an intimate setting.

name: Best Christmas-Eve-Eve Ever
description: A festive comedy celebration featuring Brittany Carney, Camden Garcia, and many more.

name: The Lay Out Holiday Pop-Up Market
description: Shop local and meet the makers at this market supporting the entrepreneurs who shape the creative culture.
short_name: The Lay Out Holiday Pop-Up Market

name: Initiative
description: An epic world premiere play about seven teens in coastal California trying to make sense of love and growing up.

name: Bookstore Closing Early for Christmas Eve
description: The Housing Works Bookstore & Cafe will observe special holiday hours for Christmas Eve.
short_name: Bookstore Closing Early for Christmas Eve

name: Christmas Eve Feast of the Seven Fishes
description: Leland's third annual feast features local fish prepared by Chef Delfin Jaranilla and served family-style. This traditional Christmas Eve dinner celebrates the holiday with a variety of seafood dishes.
short_name: Christmas Eve Feast of the Seven Fishes

name: NYCResistor Ham Radio Club
description: Monthly Amateur Radio club meeting of NYCResistorRadio curious? Join the NYC Resistor Ham Radio Club (call sign N2YCR) for our open and regular meetings, the 4th Wednesday of each month from 8:00 – 9:30 pm at NYC Resistor (87 3rd Avenue, 4th Floor). The amateur radio hobby has something for everyone, from Morse code to modern digital modes.

name: Christmas Eve Candlelight Service
description: Join us in the sanctuary or online for a peaceful, prayerful, and joyful celebration of the greatest birth story ever told.

name: Christmas Eve Service for All Ages
description: Join us in the sanctuary or online for a joyful celebration of the greatest birth story ever told.
short_name: Christmas Eve Service for All Ages

name: Song Sung Blue
description: PG-13. Based on a true story, two down-on-their-luck musicians form a joyous Neil Diamond tribute band, proving it's never too late to find love and follow your dreams.

name: Marty Supreme
description: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

name: Marty Supreme
description: Timothée Chalamet gives a defining performance as a ping-pong ace pursuing greatness in the latest film from director Josh Safdie.

name: No Other Choice
description: Park Chan-wook’s black-comedy thriller follows one man’s berserk search for a new job after he is abruptly laid off.

name: Song Sung Blue
description: Hugh Jackman and Kate Hudson star in this based-on-a-true-story saga about finding love while belting out Neil Diamond hits.

name: Is This Thing On?
description: Bradley Cooper writes, directs, and co-stars in this understated comedy drama about a middle-aged couple navigating divorce.

name: Christmas Eve Holiday Hours
description: Greenlight Bookstore opens early on Wednesday for last-minute holiday shopping. The store will close early so that staff can spend the holiday with family and friends.

name: Domino Park Trivia
location: Other Half Brewing Company Domino Park
description: Test your knowledge at Domino Park Trivia while enjoying fresh craft beer. Compete in various rounds of questions at the taproom for a chance to win.

name: Special Christmas Eve Live Music • Jazz with The Matthew Avedon Trio!
description: Celebrate Christmas Eve with a special holiday live jazz performance by The Matthew Avedon Trio.
short_name: Special Christmas Eve Live Music • Jazz

name: Wildlife Survey in Washington Square Park
description: Participate in an early morning survey to document the birds and various wildlife inhabitants of Washington Square Park.
short_name: Wildlife Survey in Washington Square Park

name: Christmas Eve at The Stand!
description: Celebrate Christmas Eve with Cipha Sounds and Monroe Martin during this festive comedy showcase.
